01_raw_llm.reason: no valid offline LLM probability baseline cache

05_no_actor_history.reason: strict cold-start/action-independent histories on evaluation rows

06_no_actor_beliefs.reason: fitted pack is action-intercept dominated on these caches

07_no_relationship_state.reason: datasets lack validated relationship state beyond IDs

09_no_institutional_constraints.reason: all reconstructed actions are permitted in source data

10_no_persistent_policy_state.reason: held-out rows evaluated without consuming test outcomes

12_no_strategic_anticipation.reason: no identified strategic response model in caches

13_no_habit_reinforcement.reason: person-disjoint rows have no training history

14_no_policy_family_uncertainty.reason: family scores collapse to shared fitted intercepts here

16_no_feasibility_mask.reason: source action sets contain no known-impossible candidates

18_point_world.reason: committed caches do not identify full posterior world particles
